caption:
AI took your to-do list. It can't touch your reason for showing up.

For 40 years, work = tasks. Tasks = identity.

AI just broke that equation.

The routine automated itself. Reports. Summaries. First drafts. Done in seconds.

So what are you paid for now?

Not execution. Judgment.
Not output. Meaning.
Not the task. The decision behind it.

The people thriving post-AI know their WHY. Not their job title. Their actual reason to contribute.

That clarity doesn't live in any training dataset on earth.

Your purpose isn't a soft skill. It's your edge.

#futureofwork #humanpurpose #ai
hook: AI took your to-do list. It can't touch your reason for showing up.
